must_pass_all: Title is a complete, compelling sentence or question (not just 'Mortgage Calculator')
Title is readable at small size (max 60 chars for headline, max 100 chars total)
One clear idea per pin — no information overload
CTA is specific and actionable (not just 'Click here')
URL includes UTM tracking (utm_source=pinterest, utm_medium=social, utm_campaign=v2_<type>_<n>)
Destination URL is correct and returns 200 (not 404/410/noindexed)
Design: high contrast, large fonts (48px+ headline), 2-4 bullets max
QFINHUB branding is visible but small (bottom corner, not dominating)
Pin passes the 'scroll test' — clear what it's about in 1 second
auto_fail: Generic stock photo or screenshot of a calculator
Destination is a noindexed page, 404, or 410
Multiple competing ideas on one pin
